instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to ship a Rails engine as a gem or prepare a new version.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to ship a Rails engine as a gem or prepare a new version.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger release-engine.

instructions.instruction: Run full test suite: `bundle exec rspec`. Fix all failures before proceeding.
instructions.original_snippets: Run full test suite: `bundle exec rspec`. Fix all failures before proceeding.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger release-engine.

instructions.instruction: Verify gemspec metadata and dependencies match tested Rails/Ruby versions.
instructions.original_snippets: Verify gemspec metadata and dependencies match tested Rails/Ruby versions.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger release-engine.

instructions.instruction: Dry-run the gem build: `gem build *.gemspec && gem push --dry-run *.gem`. Verify contents.
instructions.original_snippets: Dry-run the gem build: `gem build *.gemspec && gem push --dry-run *.gem`. Verify contents.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger release-engine.
